notes: ZOA default: approach-originated tower communication transfer may occur once a handoff is initiated.
ZOA default: center-originated tower communication transfer may occur once a handoff is initiated.
ZOA default: approach-to-approach communication transfer requires accepted track ownership.
ZOA default: center-to-approach communication transfer requires accepted track ownership.
NCT/SFO LOA: approach may transfer arrivals to SFO Tower without a STARS track handoff.
